summary: v113 manually ports external support worker w07 audit hardening in the parent worktree: run/verification.json entries must have nonempty command/status/evidence, unresolved statuses are rejected, product_success cannot rely on failed_expected verification entries, and negative fixtures cover pending verification evidence plus product-success expected-failure evidence. Product remains nonterminal because the stable infinity-category proof gap is unchanged.
